server.name: xcodebuildmcp
server.purpose: Xcode build, simulator, and iOS debug workflows
server.recommendation_reason: Simulator and project actions stay hybrid in live smoke.

contract_tests.method: Run with returnFormat set to path.
Run with an invalid returnFormat payload.

contract_tests.expected: Screenshot capture is allowed for the smoke fixture.
contract_tests.method: Skip destructive probing because the workflow only captures evidence.

workflow_skills.title: Capture iOS simulator screenshot
workflow_skills.goal: Capture the current iOS simulator screen with native Xcode tools.
workflow_skills.when_to_use: Use this when you need a PNG screenshot from the active iOS simulator.

required_context.name: output_path
required_context.guidance: Choose the output PNG path before running the command.

context_acquisition: Ask for the output path if the workflow has not already established one.
branching_rules: If no simulator is booted yet, boot the target simulator before running the screenshot command.
stop_and_ask: Stop if no simulator is booted or the target screen is unknown.

native_steps.title: Capture the active simulator screen
native_steps.details: Replace the sample OUTPUT_PATH if the user asked for a specific artifact location, and make sure the intended screen is visible before running the command.

verification: Confirm the PNG file exists at the chosen output path.
return_contract: Return the screenshot path and a short note describing what screen was captured.
guardrails: Do not overwrite an unrelated screenshot path without confirming it.
